summary: Consolidated Project Blueprint & Implementation Plan for the FIFA World Cup 2026 Stadium Operating System. Serves as the master index referencing all 34 platform specifications: Product Requirements (PRS), UX/IA Blueprint, Design System, Reusable Component Library, Interaction Framework, Dashboard Content Strategy, Enterprise Domain Model, Event-Driven Architecture, Security & Governance, Enterprise Integration, NFR Quality Attributes, Implementation Blueprint, UI/UX Visual Architecture, Responsive Layout Architecture, Navigation Shell Architecture, Screen Inventory, Page Templates, Application Shell Spec, Onboarding Spec, Fan Matchday Spec, Operations Command Spec, Volunteer Workforce Spec, Emergency Operations Spec, AI Assistant Spec, Digital Twin Spec, Executive Decision Spec, Transportation Spec, Parking Spec, Commerce Spec, Accessibility Spec, Communication Spec, Administration Spec, Asset Spec, Inventory Spec, Monitoring Spec, Governance Spec, Motion Spec, UX Audit Spec, State Spec, and Constitution Spec.
